challengeTask: Use at least 10 sentences with E-mail Writing in a real conversation or diary entry today.
hindiTask: आज E-mail Writing का उपयोग करते हुए कम से कम 10 वाक्य किसी असली बातचीत या डायरी में लिखें।
successCriteria: E-mail Writing rule applied correctly in every sentence
bonusChallenge: Record yourself speaking 5 of these sentences and check your pronunciation.
